title: Satin Ribbon. 38mm Wide - 5 Meters (Light Pink) Perfect for Gifts Wrap Sew Party, Decorations Events Dress Wedding Christmas Crafts, Bows Car, DIY, Bouquets, Cake More
features: Light Pink satin ribbon, good value and excellent quality; Size 38mm 3.8cm 1-1/2''inch, Length 5 Meters, Machine Washable, Woven Edge, BUY 3 & Get 1 Free, Please add any 3 and pay, will send 4th free roll with your order, MAKE sure order is placed from seller by using option 'Sold and Dispatched from Great Crafts Supplies of London'

Ribbon is crafted from 100% polyester, this premium-grade ribbon features a single-faced satin finish; it has a smooth, lustrous surface that enhances tactile appeal; ideal for a variety of craft projects
The ribbon is made of polyester, with a smooth and glossy surface, soft and silky, luxurious texture, and sturdy and durable.
For Gift Wrapping, Wedding Invitations, Wedding Bouquets, Hair Braids, Hair Bow, Baby Shower Decoration And Much More Besides.The High Quality Ribbons Are Party Favor And Great Craft Supplies.

Suitable for your scrapbook, bookmarks, gift cards, ribbon bows, decoration on lampshade, teddy bears, hair accessories, bags, baby pram, basket handle, champagne glasses, shoes, handbags, ribbon embroidery, ribbon bracelet, make ribbons for top of gift boxes, make ribbon bows / rosebuds and many more things.
description: Our Light Pink RIBBON is made with the finest materials and expert craftsmanship. This single-sided satin ribbon is carefully woven to perfection, ensuring a luxurious and elegant finish for all your projects. Versatile and Stylish: With its smooth texture and lustrous sheen, our RIBBON is perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Whether you're embellishing gift boxes, crafting hair accessories, or creating beautiful decorations, this satin ribbon will elevate your designs to the next level. Wide Range of Colors: Choose from a vibrant selection of colors to suit any project or theme.
